info.name: Obtain an OAuth 2.0 client-credentials access token.

items.docs: Exchange client credentials for a bearer access token used to authorize GraphQL requests.

info.name: Tax Assessor - records by ZIP code

items.docs: Query resolved tax assessor / assessment records filtered by situs ZIP code.
Query recorder deeds/transfers with connected mortgage/lien records for a county FIPS.
Retrieve parcels whose geometry is contained within a custom-drawn boundary using a PostGIS spatial operator.
Aggregate (count, sum, avg) assessed value across a ZIP code.
Resolve an owner entity and its connected property holdings.
